# Equal roots condition

## Short Teaching Summary
Equal roots condition: For a quadratic equation to have equal roots, the discriminant (D) must be set to zero. Map connection: this idea links by example_of to nearby concepts. Pause point: say the main idea in one short phrase before moving on.
